mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total_fen), 0) AS sales_fen, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` item_order ON item_order.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.deleted = 0 AND item_order.deleted = 0 AND item_order.status IN ('PAID', 'COMPLETED') AND item_order.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND item_order.pay_time < #{endTime} AND item_order.store_id = #{storeId} ), 0) AS item_quantity FROM `order` o WHERE
SELECT DATE(o.pay_time) AS sale_date, SUM(o.total_fen) AS sales_fen, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM `order` o WHERE GROUP BY DATE(o.pay_time) ORDER BY sale_date

SELECT oi.sku_id, oi.product_name, oi.spec_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS quantity, SUM(oi.price_fen * oi.quantity) AS sales_fen FROM `order` o JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY oi.sku_id, oi.product_name, oi.spec_name ORDER BY quantity DESC, sales_fen DESC LIMIT #{limit}
